listitem.para: a m-by-n matrix of doubles, the inputs, where m is the number of observations and n is the number of variables.
a m-by-1 matrix of doubles, the responses.
a n-by-1 matrix of doubles, the coefficients of the linear model.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: This function computes a linear model with n independent variables x1, x2, ..., xn which best fit the data in the least squares sense.
The linear model we compute is

refsection.title: Examples
